sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root כָּלָה)-

(1) perfection, completion, Job 11:7. Psal. 139:22 , תַּכְלִית שִׂנְאָה “perfect hatred,” “thorough hatred.”

(2) extremity, end, conclusion. Neh 3:21. Job 26:10, עַד־תַּכְלִית אֹור עִס־חשֶׁךְ “as far as where light ends in darkness.” Job 28:3, לְכַל־תַּכְלִית הוּא חֹקֵר “as far as all the extremity (in the most profound recesses of the earth) search is made.”
